blocks.text: Hovland one shot off the lead — the hunt is on at Hilton Head
Åberg leads at -8, Hovland breathes down his neck at T3 (-7). A Scandinavian duel shaping up at Hilton Head — and Hovland has form on this course.
🏎️ 15:30 — STC Saudi Arabian Grand Prix weekend, Jeddah

Liverpool fell to 5th after Tuesday's 0-2 home capitulation to PSG. Sunday delivers two unmissable fixtures: the Merseyside derby and Arsenal's title-race test at the Etihad — 6 points the gap, City desperate.
